methods.name: Run
methods.description: Execute all 81 post-flash self-tests. Returns DR0=0 when all tests pass; DR0=N (1..81) identifies the first failing test.
outputs: DR0: 0 = all 81 tests passed; N = index of first failing test (1-81)

capabilities.name: PostFlashSelfTest.Null1
capabilities.note: unused — reserved slot; Outform GTs at slots 3 and 7 are the test subjects

capabilities.name: PostFlashSelfTest.OutformChurchE
capabilities.note: Outform Church E-GT (gt_type=2, gt_seq=1, slot_id=0) — test subject for Church-domain Outform GT encoding verification

capabilities.name: PostFlashSelfTest.OutformTuringX
capabilities.note: Outform Turing X-GT (gt_type=2, gt_seq=1, slot_id=0) — test subject for Turing-domain Outform GT encoding verification
